name: プロジェクトセカイ カラフルステージ！ feat. 初音ミク

detail.description:
"Vampire", "KING", "Loki", "Charles", "Tell Your World" etc.
From the latest popular songs to famous songs that everyone knows, there are many included with 3DMV!
A rhythm game that anyone can easily enjoy, brought to you by SEGA x Colorful Palette.

■■Contains a large number of songs, from the latest popular songs to famous songs that everyone knows■■
Phonii (Lyrics: Tsumiki, Composition: Tsumiki)
Senbonzakura (lyrics: Kurousa, music: Kurousa)
Dramaturgy (lyrics: Eve, music: Eve)
Tell Your Worl
